name: hireflow-ai
description: HireFlow AI — React + Express BFF + CrewAI Python service

scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:express
scripts.dev: concurrently -n express,web -c teal,magenta "npm run dev:express" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend/express
